en: And he wrote the best songs, but my all-time favorite, it's...
ko: 그리고 그는 최고의 노래를 썼어. 근데 내가 제일 좋아하는 건

en: Remember me Though I have to say goodbye Remember me
Don't let it make you cry For even if I'm far away I hold you in my heart
I sing a secret song to you Each night we are apart Remember me
Though I have to travel far Remember me Each time you hear a sad guitar
Know that I'm with you the only way that I can be
Until you're in my arms again
ko: 다시 내 품에 안길 때까지. 그는 꿈같은 삶을 살았어.

en: He lived the kind of life you'd dream about Remember me
When he was crushed by a giant bell
I want to be just like him
